subject: Particles reextraction in MTools
body:
HI all,

Warp2 would be a gamechanger of my project. Thank you for developing this 
software!
But I couldn't find particle re-extraction function in MTools. Is there any 
way to re-extract subtomograms in MTools? I wanna try 4x binned -> 2x 
binned -> 1x binned extraction. 

Thank you!

Best,
Mingyu
